original text:
InStep Orthotics specializes in Fabrication of custom foot orthotics and modification of footwear. Canadian Certified Pedorthist, C. Ped (C), Daniel Box will give you a full assessment through a bio mechanical evaluation and gait analysis.
From this assessment and your doctor's or nurse practitioner's referral information, custom foot orthotics will then be made on location here in Fredericton. Travelling clinics in Woodstock, Waterville, and the Fredericton Junction, as well as home visits are done routinely.
I provide a total foot, skin, and nail health assessment followed by nail trimming/filing, callous/corn care, diabetic foot education, and advice on foot care products. I am pleased to serve you in your home or in one of the two locations that I offer foot care clinics. I host a clinic every Thursday at Bowman’s Pharmasave 1111 Regent St, Unit 2.
Keeping people at home is our specialty! Personal care support incontinence specialist and product supplier, dementia care, respite care relief, emotional, behavioural, social supports, restorative care and activation therapy, in home medical, and safety sales. We customize our care plans to you!
This service offers both basic and advance foot care treatment, which includes, nail clipping, care of corns, callouses, fungal nails, and ingrown nails. There are 6 different clinic locations between Fredericton to Chipman and home visits are offered as well.
Proactive Therapy Services is committed to helping individuals reach their goals and improve their quality of life. We offer Occupational Therapy Services to our clients in the community, in their homes and at their place of work. We work with employers, insurance companies, government, community partners, families and individuals to support our clients so they can achieve their goals.
I am a Licensed Optician with a practice to bring Optical services to client’s home or business.
I offer complete prescription service of frames and lenses. I work closely with three major Optical Labs to offer the very best solution for every prescription.
I also carry a full line of Optical accessories such as high quality readers and fitovers.
For a free telephone consult to determine what assistance you may need,call me with the number below I look forward to hearing from you.
We provide dental hygiene services like dental cleanings, dental polishing, fluoride treatment, sealants, tooth gem, whitening treatment and mobile dental hygiene service.The dental hygiene fee guide is reduced in comparison to the dental society fee guide, making our services more affordable.
We pride ourselves in supporting, guiding, and directing family members to be the best they can be in their caregiving role; to help them make informed decisions, to be prepared and to navigate the complex issues of caring for an aging loved one.

original text:
The quattro® coaster lets you virtually build a track and drive an Audi quattro® wherever you like, through all four seasons. You can also explore a detailed 360° view of both inside and outside the car. The app includes 3D and true-to-scale models of the Audi Q2, the Audi Q5, the Audi Q7 and the Audi A7 quattro®. It gives you an accurate impression of the design and features of the cars.
- The app first will ask you to scan the floor of your room so it can estimate dimensions, make sure the room is well lit and has a detailed surface.
- Place the car in the real world environment using Augmented Reality.
- Design your own virtual track by activating the “green ball” and move around.
- Watch the quattro® coaster TV commercial through your device to experience the extended version.
Harald A. Møller has developed this app and ensures that it is up to date regularly. However, the information is intended to be only of a non-binding and general nature and does not replace thorough individual advice regarding any purchase decision. The technical features and interiors of the described vehicles are examples only. Such features and interiors may in particular vary by country. We reserve the right to make changes at any time. Binding current information regarding technical features, interiors or properties of our vehicles can be obtained only from your authorized dealer or importer. Harald A. Møller does not assume any warranty for currentness, accuracy or completeness of the information on these sites or for uninterrupted and fault-free access. In case of references to third party sites (links), Harald A. Møller does not assume any responsibility for the contents of such linked sites. By activation a link, you are leaving the online prescense of Harald A. Møller. It is therefor possible that third party offers are governed by different regulations, including without limitation with regard to data protection. Audi wishes to promote sensible and safe driving. We recommend always following the local regulations, laws and current driving conditions to ensure safe and responsible driving.
The provider of the the Audi quattro® Coaster AR App and the responsible entity for use of your personal data in connection with the use of your personal data in connection with the use of the app is Harald A. Møller.
Configuration of/access to the Audi quattro® Coaster AR App.
You can uninstall your Audi quattro® Coaster AR App and delete the data from your mobile device at any time. You have a right to information regarding your personal data stored by Harald A. Møller at any time. For information requests as well as blocking, deletion and correction requests concerning your personal data, please contact Harald A. Møller.
Bygg en urealistisk bane og se forskjellige Audi modeller kjøre opp og ned bakker på opp til 90 grader som om det er en rollercoaster. Og alt dette i en konstant fart.

original text:
One of the wonderful things about Prosecco is that you don’t have to sacrifice flavour for price. You can pick up a bottle of bubbles for at least half the price of Champagne. And your friends will even thank you for it! In our Introduction to Champagne and Sparkling wine speedTASTING, nearly everyone prefers Prosecco. Whilst only half of people preferred Champagne.
The code word on the label that you want to be sure to look for is DOCG. What is this, you ask? Well, I shall tell you! DOCG or ‘Controlled Designation of Origin Guaranteed’ is a quality assurance label. The DOCG came about after the DOC (‘Designation of Origin’) was considered to be handed out far too liberally. The main difference between the two (besides price!) is that DOCG-labeled wines are tested by government-licensed personnel, approved, then bottled and stamped with a government number. What does this mean for consumers? You’re guaranteed to be getting top-notch quality.
And the third word to seek out is Valdobbiadene. This is the only region where Prosecco is legally allowed to be made. It’s just like Cava or Champagne, it now has a ‘trademark’ protecting it’s name.
My favourite recommendation comes from one of Italy’s top producers of this well-known sparkling wine. Nino Franco, is located in the heart of the Prosecco DOC, has been making wine since 1919. They are considered to be one of the oldest Prosecco producers and unlike many of their peers, the Franco family owns their own vineyards. This means that all decisions on viticulture are solely theirs to make: the fruit can be picked, transported and crushed at their own discretion. A they focus on lower yeilds their Italian competitors, the quality is undeniably higher. I recently had the pleasure of meeting Anthony Franco, and I must say, is was tastefully charming! And I look forward to taking him up on the offer to stay at their vineyards, sounds like an excellent Tastour!
Nino Frano Rustico DOC Brut: Start with a scent of white flowers and lemon zest, but fall into the pleasantly complex flavour. Though a dry bottle, this wine offers tiny bubbles and a green apple taste that lingers on the tongue, making it impossible not to think of summer. Redolent of white peach, mint and pear, this wonderfully popular wine is one to try!
This entry was posted in Uncategorized and tagged Caposaldo Prosecco, Crede, fun facts, london, Prosecco, taste test, Valdobbiadene on 16 April, 2012 by adminfw.
This entry was posted in Food, Olive Oil, Trivia and tagged fun facts, history, Olive Oil, triva on 21 January, 2012 by adminfw.
In Italy, Prosecco is enjoyed as a wine for every occasion. Outside Italy, it is most often drunk as an aperitif, much like Champagne.
According to the EU Sweetness of wine Regulations, Proseccos are labeled “Brut” (most dry), “Extra Dry” (medium dry) or “Dry” (most sweet).
This entry was posted in News & Trivia, Uncategorized and tagged Champagne, cocktails, fun facts, Italy, Prosecco on 16 April, 2011 by adminfw.

Schulte Staffing Solutions is seeking a Manual Machinist for our client in Peabody. Our client is a lead engineer and manufacturer of precision servo actuators, gear heads and gear component. Resulting in being able to provide custom engineered solutions to a wide of businesses. This is a direct hire opportunity with a growing company. Our client offers an excellent benefits package, competitive salary and work environment.
This position involves set-up and operation of various types of manual machining equipment in accordance with company policy, procedures, and time standards.
Shift: Monday – Friday, 7: 00 A.M. – 3: 30 P.M.

original text:
If your family’s health care costs are no longer affordable, it’s time to take regulate.
In a country with run away health care costs, many people are facing high deductibles and some are facing premiums that exceed their mortgage or rent payments. It’s time to go on the offensive and learn what’s conceivable. This book is your gateway to getting there.

original text:
The Red Sox made it fairly obvious how badly they wanted to add bullpen depth this offseason. Dan Wheeler was someone they thought would help, so they went after the veteran hard — and it paid off.
Wheeler was on Red Sox Live on Tuesday, and he spoke about how the Red Sox showed interest in him from the beginning, something that ended up being one of the deciding factors for him to come to Boston.
Now, the Rhode Island native says he's ready for a chance to win a World Series, something he thinks the Red Sox are certainly capable of doing. The addition of Wheeler will also give the team added depth in the bullpen, which is exactly what Wheeler thinks is the key to a strong bullpen.
To see his entire interview with Tom Caron and Peter Gammons, check out the video above.

original text:
September school holidays are drawing near. Kids Week on Surfers Paradise is coming, too! Celebrate all things fun and exciting at the Marquee from September 17th to 23rd with our friends of Marriott Vacation Club International.
Are you ready for action? Join PAW Patrol daily at 10 AM and 12:30 PM. Are your little ones ready to join Ryder, Marshall and Chase as they take on a new rescue mission? Also be ready to have your cameras and have your photos taken during the daily Meet and Greets at 11 AM.
Snaps from last year’s events are available at https://www.flickr.com/photos/surfersparadisegc/albums/72157659295746102.
If you are looking to escape to a tranquil home, then look no further than Club Surfers Apartments, where you can definitely feel right at home within any of our Gold Coast Surfers Paradise Apartments.
Strategically located along Gold Coast Highway Surfers Paradise, Club Surfers houses elegantly designed rooms, complete with superb guest facilities for you and your family to enjoy.
We have a sparkling heated outdoor pool where you can relax during your downtimes, or you can soothe your tired muscles in our sauna, access free WiFi anytime, indulge in sumptuous BBQ lunches at our barbecue area, and feel free to consult our tour desk staff for valuable travel advice on Queensland’s best attractions that are perfect for you and your family. Visit new destinations while you are at it, and make sure to let loose once in a while with your favourite people in the world by being on the lookout for Gold Coast cocktail parties. Visit https://www.hisitedirect.com.au today. It’s fast and easy!

original text:
This delightful city (pop. 955,500) with Roman origins is the home of a stunning 13th-century Gothic cathedral. The twin-spired structure is supported by 56 pillars and highlighted by magnificent stained-glass windows. Art lovers won’t want to miss the museum complex between the Rhine and the cathedral. It contains paintings from Dutch and German masters (14th-16th century) and modern art in a beautiful setting (white walls, lots of windows and skylights, and long halls). If you have time, visit the Roman-Germanic Museum (3rd-century Dionysian mosaics). Cologne’s a scenic city with plazas, shopping and nightlife—well worth a one-night visit, especially during its famous Carnival celebrations. A boat leaving Cologne follows the Rhine to Strasbourg, France. The most scenic part of the route lies between St. Goar and Rudesheim (lots of castles, vineyards, hills, etc. There’s a pleasant train ride from Frankfurt to Cologne, passing Lorelei, the Rhine Valley and other pretty places. Rhine River Day Cruise 20 mi/32 km north of Bonn.
The Express by Holiday Inn Cologne-Troisdorf is a modern business hotel located within easy reach of the exhibition centre K? LN MESSE, the Cologne/Bonn Airport (CGN), the main railway station and the business areas of Cologne and Bonn and the sports centre K? ln ARENA. Both by car via the A 59 motorway and public transport, the hotel is perfectly connected to all business and leisure attractions in Cologne and Bonn. The Express by Holiday Inn offers accommodation for visitors to exhibitions like Spoga, Medica or Photokina as well as shoppers headed for the old town, art and historical lovers enjoying the DOM, the shopping area of Cologne and Bonn and musical fans cheering at the Musical DOME. The Express by Holiday Inn offers 110 comfortably furnished rooms with chargeable High Speed Access, air condition, satellite and Pay TV, complimentary tea and coffee making facilities, en suite shower, hair dryer, high quality beds and sound proof windows. The hotel features both non-smoking and smoking floors as well as easy wheelchair access, a room with roll-in shower and special alarm systems. We invite our guests to enjoy a complimentary continental breakfast buffet to get the day off to a good start, while in the evening our Lobby Bar is worth a visit to relax and unwind.
Guided Tours to Old Town.

original text: It would be nearly impossible not to be doing all the right things if you can stay in business since 1963 and be successful at what you do and that is just the case with MICKEY THOMPSON WHEELS, & our Mickey Thompson tire collection is an undisputed leader in the high performance tire arena with a multiplicity of innovations to their credit such as the Wide/Low Tires at the Indy 500-12" Wheel in 1963 or the First Wide/Low Tires Red/White Sidewalls at the Indy 500-15" Wheel in 1964. The World Renowned race car driver, Mickey Thompson, had a dream of being the fastest race car driver on earth but he had difficulty getting a tire company to design a tire that would go 400 miles per hour so Mickey and a remarkable tire engineer by the name of Gene Mc Mannis decided to start their own tire company thus the start of the MICKEY THOMPSON Wheels & our Mickey Thompson tire collection. Then in 1963, after Mickey Thompson became the fastest man on record by traveling at 406.6 miles per hour three years earlier, the company designed the groundbreaking tires for the Indy 500, three times the width and with a lower profile affording more stability and the rest is history. Then Mickey and Gene MCMANNIS, a true technical genius, designed and built bias-belted off road racing tires, the precursor to today’s off-road tires. Then in 1991 the United States Navy chose MICKEY THOMPSON TIRES for their SEAL Fast Attack Vehicles during the Gulf War and that is truly a confirmation of the quality of the MICKEY THOMPSON Wheels & Mickey Thompson tires and the list of innovations goes on and on in the history of the company and it is no surprise that the company has been the first in design in almost every year since its inception – you can’t get much better than that. And if you are a drag racer like Mickey Thompson the team at LMPERFORMANCE knows you want to win but we also know you want to be safe so we are representing the best when and we offer you the MICKEY THOMPSON PRO DRAG RADIAL TIRES that are the fastest on the market because they allow for less rolling resistance and will give you the edge you need to go to the finish line first because they are compounded for maximum traction. If you still want to be street legal then check out the Mickey Thompson ET Street Radial on the LMPERFORMANCE web site with primo radial construction to not only get you down the track fast but also get you home legally. Regardless of your driving situation you want a tire you can trust but if you are racing or dragging then you are even more vulnerable so why not trust a company you know has been in the business of designing racing tires with the best in the business, Mickey THONPSON and Gene MCMANNIS, and you won’t get much better than that. And let LMPERFORMANCE help you get your tires at a competitive price on our web site where you can place an order at your convenience. Looking for some quality parts? Check out these Gorilla Lug Nuts for your wheels.

Check out these Gorilla Lug Nuts for your wheels.

original text:
Susan Nwnnediya Kanu, mother of Soccer Legend Nwankwo Kanu who died September 7th at 82 years old will be buried on Saturday Dec. 3, 2016 in Amannagwu village- Arochukwu’ Abia State.
Deputy President of the Senate Federal Republic of Nigeria Senator Ike Ekweremadu in a letter he personally to Nwankwo Kanu extols the good virtues of selfless service to humanity which she has bequeathed creditably to her children thereby keeping her name alive in the kind pages of history .
Eminent Nigerian and Soccer greats have confirmed to send condolences and support towards the burial of late Sussan Nwannediya Kanu Iheme .
Burial/planning committee chairman pastor Onyebuchi Abia says adequate security arrangements within and outside Arochukwu have been put in place due to the number of visitors expected at the ceremony.
Body of late Sussan Nwannediya Kanu Iheme will arrive Arochukwu on Friday Dec. 3, 2016 for service of songs at her residence Amannagwu -Arochukwu .
Funeral Service will be held on Saturday Dec. 3, 2016 @ 10 am @ the Presbyterian Church of Nigeria Amannagwu .
Internment will be after the service at her residence .
Reception follows immediately @ Agreey Primarily School.
